title: Ubiquiti UF-WiFi - UFiber WiFi
description: Sporting a sleek industrial design, the UFiber WiFi is a robust, high-performance GPON router / CPE that features an informational LED display with 4 Ethernet ports and WiFi The 4 Ethernet LAN ports support 10/100/1000 Mbps connections. The UFiber WiFi can be powered using 24V passive PoE on Port 1, or by 24VDC Up to 128 UFiber WiFi devices can be connected to a single GPON port. Supporting GPON links of up to 20 km, the UFiber WiFi integrates with the UFiber OLT and third-party OLT devices Device Power adapter 24V/0.5A Screws
